roles.name: Royal Architect of the Castle
roles.description: Designs the grand halls of the Salesforce solution — keeps the towers from toppling.

roles.name: Captain of the Royal Guard
roles.description: Marshals the kingdom's heroes, holds the schedule, and answers to the crown.

roles.name: Keeper of the Royal Decrees
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets across all kingdoms.

roles.name: Master Enchanter of Code
roles.description: Weaves Apex spells, conjures LWCs, and forges automation magic.

roles.name: Grand Vizier of Salesforce
roles.description: Counsel to the throne — sets the standard for all Salesforce craft in the realm.

roles.name: Senior Royal Sage
roles.description: A seasoned advisor who guides the journey through customer requirements.

roles.name: Apprentice Sage of the Court
roles.description: Learns the craft of configuration and discovery under the Senior Sage's wing.

roles.name: Bridge Master of the Enchanted Realms
roles.description: Architect of the magical bridges between Salesforce and the kingdoms beyond.

roles.name: Senior Bridge Weaver
roles.description: Lays the enchanted stones of API and middleware under the Bridge Master's plan.

roles.name: Junior Bridge Weaver
roles.description: Begins the apprenticeship of webhooks, batch jobs, and callout charms.

roles.name: Royal Tester of Potions
roles.description: Tastes every spell before it reaches the princess — finds the bitter notes early.

roles.name: Royal Herald of the Kingdom
roles.description: Lifts the banner and trumpet for the kingdom's message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Senior Town Crier
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call across the village square.

roles.name: Junior Town Crier
roles.description: Carries the day's news through the streets — content, creative, and the daily call.

roles.name: Scribe of the Royal Council
roles.description: Records the wishes of the court — translates royal dreams into design specs.

roles.name: Master Royal Enchanter
roles.description: A wizard of the highest order — leads the deepest custom builds and platform craft.

roles.name: Squire Sage in Training
roles.description: Newest of the apprentices — learning Flow, validation rules, and reports under the Sages.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Imperial China — Great Wall Defense Analytics

children.name: I'll Make a Man Out of You — Bootcamp

realms.projectName: Bayou Bayonne — Tiana's Place Restaurant Launch

children.name: Dig a Little Deeper — Crew Onboarding

agrabah.themedRole: Bridge Master of the Enchanted Realms

the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.themedRole: Bridge Master of the Enchanted Realms

arendelle.name: Coronation Day
arendelle.description: Discovery sign-off — the gates of Arendelle open at last.

arendelle.name: Let It Go — Build Kickoff
arendelle.description: Build phase begins: Elsa raises the ice palace from the mountain.

arendelle.name: Council on the North Mountain
arendelle.description: Mid-project gate: Anna and Kristoff present progress to the queen.

arendelle.name: The Great Thaw — UAT
arendelle.description: UAT acceptance: eternal winter recedes and the harbor reopens.

arendelle.name: Summer Returns — Go-Live
arendelle.description: Go-Live: the kingdom celebrates Olaf in Summer.

arendelle.name: Royal Settlement
arendelle.description: Final invoice: paid in chocolate and Sven's carrots.

agrabah.name: Diamond in the Rough Found
agrabah.description: Discovery: the right resource located deep in the Cave of Wonders.

agrabah.name: Lamp Awakens
agrabah.description: Build phase: the Genie wakes and integration spell-work begins.

agrabah.name: A Whole New World — Demo
agrabah.description: Mid-project demo: a magic carpet ride through the new platform.

agrabah.name: Sultan's Audit
agrabah.description: Solution review with the Sultan and his council.

agrabah.name: Wedding at the Palace
agrabah.description: Go-Live: Jasmine and Aladdin cut the ribbon at the new bazaar.

agrabah.name: Genie Sets You Free
agrabah.description: Final invoice: third wish granted, project closed.

mulan-china.name: Honor to the Ancestors
mulan-china.description: Kickoff: ancestral shrine blessings secured for the project.

mulan-china.name: Conscription Notice Sent
mulan-china.description: Build phase: one man from every family — and one woman in disguise.

mulan-china.name: Reflection — Mid-Build Review
mulan-china.description: Mid-project gate: the team reviews who they truly are.

mulan-china.name: Avalanche at Tung Shao Pass
mulan-china.description: Stress test: the cannon fires, the mountain falls, the army scatters.

mulan-china.name: Saving the Emperor
mulan-china.description: Go-Live: the platform defends the imperial palace.

mulan-china.name: Imperial Decree of Payment
mulan-china.description: Final invoice: sealed with the Emperor's chop.

the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.name: Almost There — Site Secured
the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.description: Discovery: the old sugar mill is purchased — Tiana's dream begins.

the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.name: Kissed by the Frog
the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.description: Build phase begins — and a few unexpected transformations.

the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.name: Mama Odie's Wisdom
the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.description: Mid-project review with the bayou's blind voodoo priestess.

the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.name: Friends on the Other Side — UAT
the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.description: UAT gate: shadow magic neutralized, the platform passes inspection.

the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.name: Grand Opening of Tiana's Place
the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.description: Go-Live: jazz plays, beignets fly, the doors open.

the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.name: Final Tip Jar
the-isle-of-naveen-tiana.description: Final invoice — paid in cash, gumbo, and good music.

Elsa.notes: Solitude on the North Mountain — needs space to control the magic.

Anna.notes: Visiting the trolls in the Valley of the Living Rock.

Olaf.notes: Summer vacation — finally experiencing warm hugs.

Kristoff.notes: Ice harvest season with Sven — annual obligation.

Jasmine.notes: Escaping the palace walls — incognito tour of the bazaar.

Aladdin.notes: Magic carpet expedition with Abu — destination unknown.

Genie.notes: World tour — finally free, taking the long-promised vacation.

Mulan.notes: Visiting Grandmother Fa and the family ancestors.

Tiana.notes: Daddy's birthday — visiting the family home.

Naveen.notes: Royal duties in Maldonia — parents demanding an appearance.

Louis the Alligator.notes: Headlining the New Orleans jazz festival.

Ray.notes: Family reunion in the bayou — all the cousins.
